specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive's supplier investment records include complete verification data required for ZEV credit eligibility as of Q4 2025?
answer: As of Q4 2025, 65% of Elexion Automotive's supplier investment records include full verification data (proof-of-origin, emissions certificates, investment receipts) required for ZEV credit eligibility.
justification: This baseline shows how many supplier records already meet verification standards; the gap identifies how much supplier remediation and documentation work Elexion must scope when designing unified tracking protocols.
dr_question: How should Elexion Automotive update its compliance documentation framework by 2026 to verify and record supply-chain investment credits under Canada’s revised ZEV mandate?
